    "concept_inventory": [
      "information product", "releasing/dissemination of information products", "protected information",
      "administratively restricted information", "dissemination plan", "release schedule", "reviews and approvals",
      "embargo", "serious data quality issues", "sampling error", "coefficient of variation (CV)", "key estimates",
      "secondary estimates", "nonsampling error", "unit response rate", "sample attrition", "item response rate",
      "coverage ratio", "combined rates", "nonresponse bias", "probability sample", "target universe", "waiver",
      "metadata", "confidentiality", "data revisions and corrections", "errata", "Dissemination Incident Report",
      "sample design", "response rate", "Section 508 accessibility"
    ]
  },
  "concepts": [
    {"id": "c_infoprod", "name": "Information product", "aliases": ["information products"], "description": "The products (data files, tabulations, publications, releases) that the standard governs the release of.", "grounding_span": "The purpose of this standard is to establish quality criteria for releasing information products.", "location": "Purpose"},
    {"id": "c_release", "name": "Releasing information products", "aliases": ["dissemination", "release"], "description": "The act of releasing information products outside the Census Bureau.", "grounding_span": "Statistical Quality Standard F1: Releasing Information Products", "location": "Title"},
    {"id": "c_protected", "name": "Protected information", "aliases": [], "description": "Information that may not be released outside the Census Bureau except as allowed by federal law.", "grounding_span": "Neither protected information nor administratively restricted information may be released outside the Census Bureau", "location": "Requirement F1–1"},
    {"id": "c_admin", "name": "Administratively restricted information", "aliases": [], "description": "Information administratively restricted from release outside the Census Bureau.", "grounding_span": "Neither protected information nor administratively restricted information may be released outside the Census Bureau", "location": "Requirement F1–1"},
    {"id": "c_dissplan", "name": "Dissemination plan", "aliases": [], "description": "A plan governing the release of information products to the public, addressing products, schedule, approvals, and mode of release.", "grounding_span": "must be released according to a dissemination plan that addresses:", "location": "Requirement F1–2"},
    {"id": "c_schedule", "name": "Release schedule", "aliases": [], "description": "The schedule for releasing regular or recurring information products, published before January 1.", "grounding_span": "The release schedule for all regular or recurring information products for the upcoming year", "location": "Requirement F1–2"},
    {"id": "c_reviews", "name": "Reviews and approvals", "aliases": [], "description": "The appropriate reviews and approvals required before releasing information products.", "grounding_span": "until they receive the appropriate reviews and approvals", "location": "Requirement F1–4"},
    {"id": "c_embargo", "name": "Embargo", "aliases": ["embargoed releases"], "description": "The prohibition on releasing embargoed news releases and data files before the specified date and time.", "grounding_span": "Embargoed news releases and data files must not be released to the public by any means", "location": "Requirement F1–5"},
    {"id": "c_sdqi", "name": "Serious data quality issues", "aliases": ["data quality issues"], "description": "Quality problems (sampling or nonsampling) that restrict how an information product may be released.", "grounding_span": "must be free of serious data quality issues in order to be released outside the Census Bureau without restrictions", "location": "Requirement F1–6"},
    {"id": "c_sampling", "name": "Sampling error", "aliases": [], "description": "Error arising from sampling, judged serious when CV exceeds 30% for a majority of key estimates.", "grounding_span": "Serious data quality issues related to sampling error occur when the estimated coefficients of variation (CV) for the majority of the key estimates are larger than 30 percent.", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 1"},
    {"id": "c_cv", "name": "Coefficient of variation (CV)", "aliases": ["CV"], "description": "A measure of sampling error; a CV above 30% for a majority of key estimates indicates a serious data quality issue.", "grounding_span": "the estimated coefficients of variation (CV) for the majority of the key estimates are larger than 30 percent", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 1"},
    {"id": "c_keyest", "name": "Key estimates", "aliases": [], "description": "The primary estimates of a data program, to which the quality thresholds apply.", "grounding_span": "provides requirements for identifying key estimates", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 1, Note 2"},
    {"id": "c_secest", "name": "Secondary estimates", "aliases": [], "description": "Estimates that are not key; the sampling-error requirement does not apply to them.", "grounding_span": "This requirement does not apply to secondary estimates.", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 1, Note 1"},
    {"id": "c_nonsampling", "name": "Nonsampling error", "aliases": [], "description": "Error not attributable to sampling, judged serious under defined conditions and rate thresholds.", "grounding_span": "Serious data quality issues related to nonsampling error occur when:", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 2"},
    {"id": "c_unitrr", "name": "Unit response rate", "aliases": ["cumulative unit response rate"], "description": "A response rate whose value below 60 percent indicates a serious nonsampling error.", "grounding_span": "Unit response rates for surveys or censuses, or cumulative unit response rates for panel or longitudinal surveys, are below 60 percent.", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 2b"},
    {"id": "c_attrition", "name": "Sample attrition", "aliases": [], "description": "Loss of sample between waves in panel/longitudinal surveys; greater than five percent indicates a serious issue.", "grounding_span": "Sample attrition from one wave to the next wave in panel or longitudinal surveys is greater than five percent.", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 2b"},
    {"id": "c_itemrr", "name": "Item response rate", "aliases": ["total quantity response rate"], "description": "Response rate on key items; below 70 percent indicates a serious nonsampling error.", "grounding_span": "Item response rates or total quantity response rates on key items are below 70 percent.", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 2b"},
    {"id": "c_coverage", "name": "Coverage ratio", "aliases": [], "description": "Ratio for population groups associated with key estimates; below 70 percent indicates a serious issue.", "grounding_span": "Coverage ratios for population groups associated with key estimates are below 70 percent.", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 2b"},
    {"id": "c_combined", "name": "Combined rates", "aliases": [], "description": "Combined rate for key estimates (unit response × item response × coverage); below 50 percent indicates a serious issue.", "grounding_span": "Combined rates for key estimates (e.g., computed as unit response item response coverage) are below 50 percent.", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 2b"},
    {"id": "c_nrbias", "name": "Nonresponse bias", "aliases": [], "description": "Bias associated with nonresponse; if shown acceptable or mitigated, the rate thresholds do not apply.", "grounding_span": "bias is often associated with low response rates or with low coverage ratios", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 2b, Note 1"},
    {"id": "c_prob", "name": "Probability sample", "aliases": ["non-probability sample"], "description": "Surveys not using probability samples are treated differently under a 70% target-universe threshold.", "grounding_span": "The Census Bureau conducts a few surveys that do not use probability samples.", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 2b, Note 2"},
    {"id": "c_universe", "name": "Target universe", "aliases": [], "description": "The universe of units; for non-probability establishment surveys, responding units must comprise at least 70 percent of it.", "grounding_span": "the responding units do not comprise at least 70 percent of the target universe", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 2b, Note 2"},
    {"id": "c_waiver", "name": "Waiver", "aliases": [], "description": "Approval the program manager must obtain before releasing a publication with serious nonsampling error.", "grounding_span": "The program manager must obtain a waiver before releasing the information product.", "location": "Sub-Requirement F1–6.2, item 2a"},
    {"id": "c_metadata", "name": "Metadata", "aliases": [], "description": "Summary metadata describing quality issues and their impact that must accompany restricted releases.", "grounding_span": "Include summary metadata describing the issues and the impact on the data.", "location": "Sub-Requirement F1–6.2, item 2c"},
    {"id": "c_conf", "name": "Confidentiality", "aliases": ["confidentiality constraints"], "description": "Confidentiality constraints subject to which products may be released.", "grounding_span": "subject to confidentiality constraints", "location": "Sub-Requirement F1–6.1"},
    {"id": "c_revision", "name": "Data revisions and corrections", "aliases": [], "description": "Planned data revisions or corrections for data quality issues identified after release.", "grounding_span": "including those related to any planned data revisions or any corrections for data quality issues identified after an information product has been released", "location": "Requirement F1–3"},
    {"id": "c_errata", "name": "Errata", "aliases": [], "description": "A document describing an error and its correction, one appropriate action for addressing serious errors.", "grounding_span": "Release an \"errata\" document for the product, describing the error and the correction.", "location": "Requirement F1–9"},
    {"id": "c_dir", "name": "Dissemination Incident Report", "aliases": [], "description": "The report documenting serious errors, submitted to the Quality Program Staff.", "grounding_span": "must be documented by completing the Dissemination Incident Report found in", "location": "Sub-Requirement F1–9.1"},
    {"id": "c_sampledesign", "name": "Sample design", "aliases": [], "description": "One of the process areas where serious nonsampling issues can arise.", "grounding_span": "in sample design, sampling methods, questionnaire or forms design, data collection, data processing, estimation procedures", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 2a"},
    {"id": "c_resprate", "name": "Response rate", "aliases": [], "description": "Rates whose computation is governed by Standard D3 and which serve as quality thresholds.", "grounding_span": "specifies requirements on computing response rates", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 2b, Note 3"}
  ],
  "definitions": [],
  "claims": [
    {"id": "cl1", "claim_text": "Neither protected information nor administratively restricted information may be released outside the Census Bureau, except as allowed under applicable federal laws and data-use agreements.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "Neither protected information nor administratively restricted information may be released outside the Census Bureau, except as allowed under applicable federal laws", "location": "Requirement F1–1"},
    {"id": "cl2", "claim_text": "Information products released to the public must be released according to a dissemination plan.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "Information products released to the public by the Census Bureau must be released according to a dissemination plan that addresses:", "location": "Requirement F1–2"},
    {"id": "cl3", "claim_text": "The release schedule for all regular or recurring information products for the upcoming year must be published on www.census.gov before January 1 of that year.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "The release schedule for all regular or recurring information products for the upcoming year must be published on", "location": "Requirement F1–2, item 2"},
    {"id": "cl4", "claim_text": "Policies and procedures for disseminating information products must be documented and published on the Census Bureau's Internet Web site.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "must be documented and published on the Census Bureau’s Internet Web site.", "location": "Requirement F1–3"},
    {"id": "cl5", "claim_text": "Information products must not be released outside the Census Bureau until they receive the appropriate reviews and approvals.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "Information products must not be released outside the Census Bureau until they receive the appropriate reviews and approvals.", "location": "Requirement F1–4"},
    {"id": "cl6", "claim_text": "Embargoed news releases and data files must not be released to the public before the specified date and time of release.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "Embargoed news releases and data files must not be released to the public by any means", "location": "Requirement F1–5"},
    {"id": "cl7", "claim_text": "Information products must be free of serious data quality issues in order to be released outside the Census Bureau without restrictions.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "must be free of serious data quality issues in order to be released outside the Census Bureau without restrictions", "location": "Requirement F1–6"},
    {"id": "cl8", "claim_text": "Serious data quality issues related to sampling error occur when the estimated CV for the majority of the key estimates are larger than 30 percent.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "Serious data quality issues related to sampling error occur when the estimated coefficients of variation (CV) for the majority of the key estimates are larger than 30 percent.", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 1"},
    {"id": "cl9", "claim_text": "Serious nonsampling error occurs when unit response rates are below 60 percent, item response rates below 70 percent, coverage ratios below 70 percent, or combined rates below 50 percent, or attrition exceeds five percent.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "Unit response rates for surveys or censuses, or cumulative unit response rates for panel or longitudinal surveys, are below 60 percent.", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 2b"},
    {"id": "cl10", "claim_text": "If nonresponse bias is shown to be at an acceptable level or mitigation is effective, the response-rate and coverage thresholds do not apply.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "these thresholds do not apply", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 2b, Note 1"},
    {"id": "cl11", "claim_text": "For non-probability establishment surveys, serious data quality issues exist if responding units do not comprise at least 70 percent of the target universe.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "These surveys have serious data quality issues if the responding units do not comprise at least 70 percent of the target universe", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 2b, Note 2"},
    {"id": "cl12", "claim_text": "When a possibly serious data quality issue is suspected in a released product, the program manager must notify Census Bureau senior management immediately.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "the program manager must notify Census Bureau senior management of the issue immediately after it has been identified", "location": "Requirement F1–7"},
    {"id": "cl13", "claim_text": "When serious data quality issues are identified in a previously released product, a notification must be disseminated to alert the public.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "When serious data quality issues are identified in a previously released information product, a notification must be disseminated to alert the public.", "location": "Requirement F1–8"},
    {"id": "cl14", "claim_text": "Any serious error or data quality issue identified in a previously released product must be addressed appropriately.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "Any serious error or data quality issue identified in a previously released information product must be addressed appropriately.", "location": "Requirement F1–9"},
    {"id": "cl15", "claim_text": "Serious errors must be documented by completing the Dissemination Incident Report and submitting it to the Quality Program Staff.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "must be documented by completing the Dissemination Incident Report found in", "location": "Sub-Requirement F1–9.1"},
    {"id": "cl16", "claim_text": "Information products approved for release must be published on the Census Bureau's Internet Web site and adhere to Section 508 of the U.S. Rehabilitation Act.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "Information products approved for release to the public must be published on the Census Bureau’s Internet Web site and must adhere to the requirements of Section 508 of the U.S. Rehabilitation Act.", "location": "Requirement F1–10"}
  ],
  "instruments": [],
  "measures": [],
  "standards": [
    {"id": "st_f1", "name": "Statistical Quality Standard F1: Releasing Information Products", "version": "Revised December 16, 2021", "steward": "U.S. Census Bureau", "as_of_date": "2021-12-16", "grounding_span": "Statistical Quality Standard F1: Releasing Information Products", "location": "Title"},
    {"id": "st_omb3", "name": "Statistical Policy Directive No. 3", "version": null, "steward": "Office of Management and Budget (OMB)", "as_of_date": null, "grounding_span": "Statistical Policy Directive No. 3", "location": "Purpose"},
    {"id": "st_omb4", "name": "Statistical Policy Directive No. 4", "version": null, "steward": "Office of Management and Budget (OMB)", "as_of_date": null, "grounding_span": "Statistical Policy Directive No. 4", "location": "Purpose"},
    {"id": "st_508", "name": "Section 508 of the U.S. Rehabilitation Act", "version": null, "steward": "United States (federal law)", "as_of_date": null, "grounding_span": "Section 508 of the U.S. Rehabilitation Act", "location": "Requirement F1–10"}
  ],

    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-f1-rele", "to_id": "cl5", "grounding_span": "Information products must not be released outside the Census Bureau until they receive the appropriate reviews and approvals.", "location": "Requirement F1–4"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-f1-rele", "to_id": "cl6", "grounding_span": "Embargoed news releases and data files must not be released to the public by any means", "location": "Requirement F1–5"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-f1-rele", "to_id": "cl7", "grounding_span": "must be free of serious data quality issues in order to be released outside the Census Bureau without restrictions", "location": "Requirement F1–6"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-f1-rele", "to_id": "cl8", "grounding_span": "Serious data quality issues related to sampling error occur when the estimated coefficients of variation (CV) for the majority of the key estimates are larger than 30 percent.", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 1"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-f1-rele", "to_id": "cl9", "grounding_span": "Unit response rates for surveys or censuses, or cumulative unit response rates for panel or longitudinal surveys, are below 60 percent.", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 2b"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-f1-rele", "to_id": "cl10", "grounding_span": "If nonresponse bias analyses or other studies show that the bias associated with nonresponse is at an acceptable level, or that steps taken to mitigate nonresponse bias or coverage error are effective, these thresholds do not apply.", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 2b, Note 1"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-f1-rele", "to_id": "cl11", "grounding_span": "These surveys have serious data quality issues if the responding units do not comprise at least 70 percent of the target universe", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 2b, Note 2"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-f1-rele", "to_id": "cl12", "grounding_span": "the program manager must notify Census Bureau senior management of the issue immediately after it has been identified", "location": "Requirement F1–7"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-f1-rele", "to_id": "cl13", "grounding_span": "When serious data quality issues are identified in a previously released information product, a notification must be disseminated to alert the public.", "location": "Requirement F1–8"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-f1-rele", "to_id": "cl14", "grounding_span": "Any serious error or data quality issue identified in a previously released information product must be addressed appropriately.", "location": "Requirement F1–9"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-f1-rele", "to_id": "cl15", "grounding_span": "must be documented by completing the Dissemination Incident Report found in", "location": "Sub-Requirement F1–9.1"},
    {"type": "asserts", "from_id": "census-bureau-statistical-quality-standards-standard-f1-rele", "to_id": "cl16", "grounding_span": "Information products approved for release to the public must be published on the Census Bureau’s Internet Web site and must adhere to the requirements of Section 508 of the U.S. Rehabilitation Act.", "location": "Requirement F1–10"},
    {"type": "about", "from_id": "cl1", "to_id": "c_protected", "grounding_span": "Neither protected information nor administratively restricted information may be released outside the Census Bureau", "location": "Requirement F1–1"},

    {"type": "about", "from_id": "cl5", "to_id": "c_reviews", "grounding_span": "until they receive the appropriate reviews and approvals", "location": "Requirement F1–4"},
    {"type": "about", "from_id": "cl6", "to_id": "c_embargo", "grounding_span": "Embargoed news releases and data files must not be released to the public by any means", "location": "Requirement F1–5"},

    {"type": "about", "from_id": "cl8", "to_id": "c_sampling", "grounding_span": "Serious data quality issues related to sampling error occur when", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 1"},

    {"type": "about", "from_id": "cl10", "to_id": "c_nrbias", "grounding_span": "the bias associated with nonresponse is at an acceptable level", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 2b, Note 1"},
    {"type": "about", "from_id": "cl11", "to_id": "c_universe", "grounding_span": "the responding units do not comprise at least 70 percent of the target universe", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 2b, Note 2"},
    {"type": "about", "from_id": "cl12", "to_id": "c_sdqi", "grounding_span": "a data quality issue that might be serious is suspected in a previously released information product", "location": "Requirement F1–7"},

    {"type": "about", "from_id": "cl15", "to_id": "c_dir", "grounding_span": "must be documented by completing the Dissemination Incident Report found in", "location": "Sub-Requirement F1–9.1"},
    {"type": "about", "from_id": "cl16", "to_id": "c_release", "grounding_span": "Information products approved for release to the public must be published on the Census Bureau’s Internet Web site", "location": "Requirement F1–10"},
    {"type": "has_component", "from_id": "c_sdqi", "to_id": "c_sampling", "grounding_span": "Serious data quality issues related to sampling error", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 1"},
    {"type": "has_component", "from_id": "c_sdqi", "to_id": "c_nonsampling", "grounding_span": "Serious data quality issues related to nonsampling error occur when:", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 2"},
    {"type": "has_component", "from_id": "c_sampling", "to_id": "c_cv", "grounding_span": "the estimated coefficients of variation (CV) for the majority of the key estimates are larger than 30 percent", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 1"},
    {"type": "has_component", "from_id": "c_nonsampling", "to_id": "c_unitrr", "grounding_span": "Unit response rates for surveys or censuses, or cumulative unit response rates for panel or longitudinal surveys, are below 60 percent.", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 2b"},
    {"type": "has_component", "from_id": "c_nonsampling", "to_id": "c_itemrr", "grounding_span": "Item response rates or total quantity response rates on key items are below 70 percent.", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 2b"},
    {"type": "has_component", "from_id": "c_nonsampling", "to_id": "c_coverage", "grounding_span": "Coverage ratios for population groups associated with key estimates are below 70 percent.", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 2b"},
    {"type": "has_component", "from_id": "c_nonsampling", "to_id": "c_combined", "grounding_span": "Combined rates for key estimates (e.g., computed as unit response item response coverage) are below 50 percent.", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 2b"},
    {"type": "has_component", "from_id": "c_nonsampling", "to_id": "c_attrition", "grounding_span": "Sample attrition from one wave to the next wave in panel or longitudinal surveys is greater than five percent.", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 2b"},

  "proposed_relationships": [
    {"grounding_span": "Information products with data that have any of the serious data quality issues in Requirement F1–6 may be released outside the Census Bureau only under the restrictions described below.", "location": "Sub-Requirement F1–6.2", "suggested_edge": "conditionally_permits", "note": "A product with serious data quality issues (cl7/c_sdqi) is permitted for release only subject to the restrictions in Sub-Requirement F1–6.2 — a conditional-permission relationship the allowed edge types cannot express."},
    {"grounding_span": "If nonresponse bias analyses or other studies show that the bias associated with nonresponse is at an acceptable level, or that steps taken to mitigate nonresponse bias or coverage error are effective, these thresholds do not apply.", "location": "Requirement F1–6, item 2b, Note 1", "suggested_edge": "overridden_by_condition", "note": "The nonsampling rate thresholds (cl9) are overridden when nonresponse bias is shown acceptable (cl10) — an exception/override between two normative claims not expressible with conflicts_with."},
    {"grounding_span": "Program managers must notify the responsible Division Chief(s) and Associate Director (Requirement F1–7) before making notifications to the public or sponsors.", "location": "Requirement F1–8, Note", "suggested_edge": "must_precede", "note": "Requirement F1–7 (notify senior management) must temporally precede Requirement F1–8 (public notification); precedes is restricted to Concept→Concept, so this Claim→Claim ordering is staged for review."}
  ]
}
